narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: The massive expansion in AI data center spending continues to drive record demand for high-performance chips.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The massive market for weight-loss drugs continues to drive significant growth and investment.

narratives.name: Consumer Value Rotation
narratives.thesis: Resilient consumer spending is flowing toward discount leaders amid rising costs.

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Expansion
narratives.thesis: Increasing AI-driven cyber threats are forcing enterprises to expand their security spend and platform integration.

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: The integration of AI into content creation and ad targeting is boosting engagement and monetization.

narratives.name: Real-Yield Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Rising real interest rates are making non-yielding gold less attractive to investors.

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Rising Treasury yields are compressing the multiples of high-growth software stocks.

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Higher yields are creating macro volatility and uncertainty for large-scale banking operations.

narratives.name: Healthcare Plan Scrutiny
narratives.thesis: Institutional exits and concerns over Medicare resets are pressuring managed care stocks.

narratives.name: Institutional De-risking
narratives.thesis: Major institutional selling is weighing on the valuation of global payment networks.

narratives.name: Agentic AI Integration
narratives.thesis: Companies are moving from LLM experimentation to deploying autonomous AI agents within core workflows.

narratives.name: China Geopolitical Shifts
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical tensions and regulatory uncertainty in China are weighing on major e-commerce players.

narratives.name: China Aerospace Demand
narratives.thesis: New aircraft orders from China are providing a significant tailwind for major manufacturers.

narratives.name: Industrial Demand Tailwinds
narratives.thesis: Growing demand for silver in clean energy and industrial applications is providing a floor for prices.

Technology.thesis: AI infrastructure demand remains the primary growth engine, but rising bond yields are pressuring software valuations.
watchFor: Mag 7 capex guide DOWN at next earnings

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumers are bifurcating, with resilience in value-oriented retail but significant headwinds in China-linked growth.

Communication Services.thesis: AI-enhanced advertising and content dominance are driving strong momentum for major digital platforms.

Industrials.thesis: Geopolitical shifts are creating localized demand in aerospace, though macro uncertainty remains.

Healthcare.thesis: GLP-1 obesity drugs are a massive tailwind, but healthcare plans are facing institutional selling.

Financials.thesis: Rising yields and institutional rotation are pressuring both diversified banks and credit services.

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Inflationary pressures are driving a rotation into discount retailers as consumers seek value.

Precious Metals.thesis: Gold is facing pressure from rising real yields, while silver benefits from industrial demand.
